statement: Unit tests for the phase readiness presentation labels: asserts a label exists for every ReadinessState and that readinessAriaLabel / readinessTooltip expose the readiness state plus the checklist affordance (src/builder/cards/templates/phase/readiness-label.test.ts). Added in CC-4 readiness accessibility.
Theme preference unit tests: verifies document theme application and version-scoped local preference persistence.
Regression tests for requirements reconciliation candidate classification.
Reconciliation engine unit tests: verifies inventory, candidate link inference, orphan/partial/stale detection.
Verification module unit tests: 26 tests covering evidence binding, staleness detection, verification reports.
PAC-R4 live parity suite -- proves realDispatch returns contract-valid, mock-equivalent shapes for all 22 routes against seeded dev data.
Colocated tests verifying the capture sink is off by default, scrubs secret-like keys, and leaves apiClient data/timing unchanged (BE3-R5a).
